race.description: Living Legends Summer MDS Heat 5 Handicap (Bm66)
race.comment: GLOBAL ECLIPSE (2) is going well and gets the right set up here. He got a deserved win two back at Pakenham and was good again last time at Caulfield in a slowly run race. He'll land in a great spot here and take catching. CONVO (9) continues to race well without winning and drops 4kg off last start with a handy claim for Logan Bates. She can be hitting the line late and can get over the top. OLNEY (7) broke through for a narrow win last time and could continue his consistent form. BROADHURST (10) was too good for easier company at Kyneton last time, far too good for BM62 company there. This is harder but she should go on with it.
